## The Fundamental and Technical Analysis Answer Guide / Key

On this page you will find a single chart for your stock (and for every stock in the exercise) that shows, for the past year, the candestick chart with Bollinger Bands, stock volume and the Relative Strength Index.

The Buy / Sell indication portion of the exercise uses RSI, though Bollinger Bands can be used as well. This is an important concept: most technical analysis tools are complementary. When visualizing Bollinger Bands and RSI, as we are here, you will notice that they tell about the same buy/sell signal story for each stock.

Remember: when RSI exceeds 70 (in this exercise and typically), that's a sell signal. When is dips below 30, that's a buy signal. This Answer Guide provides up to three buy / sell signal dates. There may be more, and it is fine if there are fewer or none, which is possible. The exercise asks for three examples of each where possible.

The time period used here is May 1, 2023 through May 1, 2024. We will use the one year view in [Yahoo Finance](https://finance.yahoo.com/chart/AAPL#- "Yahoo Finance Advanced Charts - Apple") for this exercise.
